name: Apxor
description: In-app experience SDK for mobile apps — nudges, walkthroughs, tooltips, surveys powered by user behavior data.

seo.title: Apxor — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Apxor: In-app experience SDK for mobile apps — nudges, walkthroughs, tooltips, surveys powered by user behavior data.

when_to_use: Contextual nudges to guide new user onboarding in mobile apps
Tooltip overlays triggered by user behavior to surface hidden features
In-app survey delivery based on session depth and engagement signals
Walkthrough flows for complex multi-step mobile product features

pros: Walkthroughs and tooltips designed for mobile UX
Segmentation tied to real-time user events
cons: SDK footprint can bloat mobile binaries
Reporting lags behind dedicated analytics tools
review.verdict: Decent no-code mobile nudge SDK, strongest for growth teams in APAC with limited eng bandwidth.
review.best_for: Mobile PMs running onboarding and retention nudges without shipping code
review.not_for: Teams needing web support or mature experimentation infra
